summary: EG(exception) is zend_object, not zval, in PHP 7
Manager::getServers() should omit unknown servers
description:
When {{Manager::getServers()}} is called before cluster discovery (e.g. immediately after construction), it returns Server instances with missing information. We should filter out these servers so that only known servers are returned.

Note: previously, this ticket requested a change to ensure that at least one discovery round has been performed. We ultimately decided against that, as it makes {{getServers()}} too similar to {{selectServer()}}.

summary: PHP 7: MAKE_STD_ZVAL is a gonner
create_object changes
description: Allocating a object has changed since properties or inlined now

summary: dtor on bson_to_zval() failure
description: When bson_to_zval() fails, should the caller really need to zval_ptr_dtor() ? That seems a bit.. weird.

summary: PHONGO_TODO_SSL
description:
I've ifdef'd out some of the stream/ssl code under PHONGO_TODO_SSL

It needs porting to PHP7.

summary: PHONGO_TODO_INI
description: If ifdef'd out the INI registration and updating/altering under PHONGO_TODO_INI.

summary: PHONGO_TODO_STREAM
description: I've ifdef'd out some of the stream context code under PHONGO_TODO_STREAM, it might only need the zend_hash_find() API change though

summary: PHP 7: zend_read_property prototype is different in PHP 7
description:
zend_read_property now includes a zval for any error code returns. 

Commit for this change:
https://github.com/pboyd04/mongo-php-driver-prototype/commit/ebb827697101dbc132e2ddb245b925a50423468f

summary: PHP 7: PHP 7 changes the way INI entries are implemented
description:
The PHP 7 code base uses a new set of macros instead of relying on a static structure definition. 

Here is commit to change to using the new STD_PHP_INI_ENTRY macro:
https://github.com/pboyd04/mongo-php-driver-prototype/commit/917d45eaf83b54db2d00b4d39353c3aa39e957ec

summary: PHP 7: nApplyCount changes in HashTables
description:
PHP 7 has now added macros to access or modify apply count. I've added these macros to PHP 5 for compatibility purposes.

https://github.com/pboyd04/mongo-php-driver-prototype/commit/4211837e139369960ac8c835f138341b61350c1c

summary: dup argument in most string macros removed
description:
RETURN_STRINGL()
RETVAL_STRING()
add_*_string()

These no longer take a final "duplicate" argument.

summary: zpp 's' expects size_t
zval_used_for_init no longer applicable
Handle IS_TRUE and IS_FALSE in BSON
Hash API off-by-one changes
zval changes; zval pointer becomes zval; zval** -> zval*
description:
See https://wiki.php.net/phpng-upgrading#zval

More or less all zval* cases should be replaced with zval, and zval** with zval*.

summary: Merge Release notes
description:
At this point we're starting to flood the root folder with RELEASE-x.y.z files.

We should merge the 0.y.z notes into RELEASE-0 and start a RELEASE-1.0 file and then RELEASE-1.1 file.

summary: Encoding a DateTime instance produces no BSON
Return value objects from Manager::getWriteConcern() and getReadPreference()
description: Currently, these methods return arrays in the form of each value object's debug output. We should instead return the actual value objects, so the return values may be used with methods expecting a WriteConcern or ReadPreference.

summary: Implement getters for ReadPreference and WriteConcern properties
description: Getters may be useful so that users can inspect these objects without resorting to the debug handlers.

summary: WriteConcern constructor should accept only integer and strings for $w, without casting
WriteConcern constructor should throw for invalid $w and $wtimeout values
description:
{{mongoc_write_concern_set_w()}} requires the argument to be >= -3 or it is a NOP. We should raise an exception if {{$w}} is an integer < -3.

Additionally, should we raise an exception if the {{$wtimeout}} argument is < 0. Currently, libmongoc doesn't check for this and allows a negative timeout to be set, which may be an oversight. Per the [documentation|http://docs.mongodb.org/manual/reference/write-concern/#wtimeout], {{wtimeout}} should be >= 0.

summary: Application freezes for a minute when providing invalid hosts
Segfault when using Manager through singleton class
Query constructor may corrupt incoming options

summary: BSON encoding should ignore protected/private properties
mongoc 1.2.0-rc0[-dev] changes
description:
mongoc-1.2.0-rc0[-dev] has couple of fixes that affect phongo.

#1: The server_id can no longer be overwritten to -1 on a cursor.

This means phongo has to check if it has server_id/hint before overwriting the cursor->hint

#2: queries to standalone servers no longer contain $readPreferences

That was a bug, $readPreferences should only be sent to mongos.

summary: Failed authentication causes re-authentication attempt
Include PHP version in debug logs
slaveOk bit not set when using hint to query a secondary directly
description:
The following tests fail with "not master" exceptions after bumping to libmongoc 1.2.0-rc0:

 * tests/server/server-executeCommand-002.phpt
 * tests/server/server-executeQuery-005.phpt

These errors should be resolved be CDRIVER-903.

summary: Authentication error result in weird error message
SSL/TLS already set-up for this stream
BulkWrite and executeInsert() should support an options array
description:
{{executeUpdate()}} and {{executeDelete()}} currently take an options array (between the query arguments and WriteConcern); however, {{executeBulkWrite()}} and {{executeInsert()}} do not and BulkWrite's constructor only takes a boolean {{$ordered}} argument.

Current protos:

 * public function Manager::executeBulkWrite(string $namespace, BulkWrite $bulk, ?WriteConcern $writeConcern = null): WriteResult
 * public function Manager::executeInsert(string $namespace, mixed $document, ?WriteConcern $writeConcern = null): WriteResult
 * public function BulkWrite::__construct(boolean $ordered)

This leaves no way to support a "bypassDocumentValidation" option at the basic driver level. We will need to change these prototypes to allow passing of such an option (and perhaps others down the line). Since we can create a BulkWrite with options, there is no need to change {{executeBulkWrite()}}.

Proposed protos:

 * public function Manager::executeInsert(string $namespace, mixed $document, ?array $insertOptions = [], ?WriteConcern $writeConcern = null): WriteResult
 * public function BulkWrite::__construct(?array $bulkWriteOptions = [])

Actually implementation of "bypassDocumentValidation" will be handled by PHPC-443. This issue only pertains to modifying our public API to support an options array, to which we'll later add "bypassDocumentValidation".

summary: Production debug logs
description:
Currently we compile mongoc with -DMONGOC_TRACE -- which really isn't meant for production builds.

We do this though to make debugging sane.
It would be great if we can patch the mongoc tracing to be compiled in, but disabled depending on "configuration setting".

summary: toJSON and fromJSON should throw exceptions on errors
description:
{{toJSON()}} should throw UnexpectedValueExceptions (just like {{toPHP()}}):

 * Could not read document from BSON reader
 * Reading document did not exhaust input buffer

{{fromJSON()}} should throw an UnexpectedValueException on any error parsing the JSON. For now, it's suitable to simply report the {{bson_error_t}} message.

summary: Awkward php.net/mongodb link
description:
Currently http://php.net/mongodb leads to awkward TOC rather then the frontpage of the extension.

This can be easily fixed by updating https://github.com/php/web-php/blob/master/error.php

summary: Docs: Improve ecosystem landing page to include new drivers
Wrong license on PECL page
description:
The PECL page for the PHP mongodb driver

https://pecl.php.net/package/mongodb

says the license is "New BSD License", which doesn't match the LICENSE file in the download which says "Apache License Version 2.0".

summary: Dependency on openssl is added even if the extension is not marked for compilation
Fix return value comparison in check_closed stream handler
Use constant-time hash comparison functions
Manager::selectServer() should throw when failing to select a server
Use electionId to detect stale primaries.
Fix bson_init_static() precondition failure
description:
{code}
<?php                                                                                
$opts = array (                                                                      
  'allowPartialResults' => false,                                                    
  'batchSize' => 101,                                                                
  'comment' => '',                                                                   
  'cursorType' => 0,                                                                 
  'limit' => 1,                                                                      
  'maxTimeMS' => 0,                                                                  
  'modifiers' =>                                                                     
  array (                                                                            
  ),                                                                                 
  'noCursorTimeout' => false,                                                        
  'oplogReplay' => false,                                                            
  'projection' =>                                                                    
  array (                                                                            
  ),                                                                                 
  'skip' => 0,                                                                       
  'sort' =>                                                                          
  array (                                                                            
  ),                                                                                 
  'cursorFlags' => 0,                                                                
);                                                                                   
                                                                                     
$m = new MongoDB\Driver\Manager("mongodb://localhost:27017");                        
$q = new MongoDB\Driver\Query(array(), $opts);                                       
                                                                                     
$m->executeQuery("dbname.collname", $q);          
echo "I'm alive\n";
{code}

summary: Support bypassDocumentValidation option for insert and update commands
description: We need to be able to specify a "bypassDocumentValidation" option for insert and update operations. This means we need to change BulkWrite to check for this option (alongside "ordered").

summary: phongo_stream_initiator() constructs invalid stream URI for IPv6 literal
Disable async stream connections to avoid failed IPv6 connections
Typo in config.m4 prevents use of custom libsasl
description: The script iterates on {{$MONGODB_SASL}} when it should refer to {{$PHP_MONGODB_SASL}}.
